title: Legacy of the Incas
writer: Karl May, Georg Marischka, Winfried Groth
actors: Guy Madison, Rik Battaglia, Heinz Erhardt
plot: During the 1800s, Peru's government sends 2 envoys to negotiate peace with the rebellious Incas but a treasure-hunter bandit shoots the Inca ruler and his son, leaving the 2 envoys to take the blame for it.
country: West Germany, Italy, Spain, Monaco, Bulgaria
